message:
feat(render-canvas): add diagram title rendering test and fix font format string layout

Adds render_draws_generic_diagram_title test verifying that flowcharts with
a title set in meta render the title text via fill_text on the canvas context.
Also reformats the set_font format string for rustfmt compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
